description_long: This is an ornate, tall ceramic vase with a bulbous base, a slender neck, and a wide, flared spout. The vase features a single, elegantly curved handle that attaches from the upper neck to the body, with a decorative flourish at the top. Its surface is finished in a glossy brown glaze, adorned with intricate black scrollwork and floral motifs that wrap around the body and neck. The base is circular and slightly flared, providing stability and echoing the decorative patterns found on the main body. The overall form is reminiscent of antique ewers or pitchers, blending both decorative and functional qualities. The craftsmanship and detailed ornamentation suggest it is intended as a display piece in a refined urban setting.
description: A glossy brown ceramic vase with a bulbous base, slender neck, ornate handle, and intricate black scrollwork. Its elegant form and detailed decoration make it a striking display piece.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flared spout, ornate handle, and detailed scrollwork on the bulbous body.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the full curve of the handle and the elongated neck, with patterns visible on the body and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the attachment of the handle to the neck and body, with scrollwork wrapping around the surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the handle's decorative flourish and the continuity of the black motifs.
